digest.title: Kimi K3, Qwen 3.8, and Anthropic's (Potential) Unravelling
At SIGGRAPH, NVIDIA Advances Graphics and Simulation With Agentic and Physical AI
digest.tldr: From open models to real-time simulation, AI and graphics breakthroughs are transforming media, content creation and robotics.

digest.title: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
digest.tldr: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.
